response:
Maria buys granola bars that come in boxes of 12 bars per box, with each bar containing 90 calories. If Maria has already eaten 3 bars, how many calories are remaining in the box? Start and end your response with the same word (do not write anything after the last word, not even punctuation).  

The box originally contains 12 bars, each with 90 calories, so the total calories in the box are 12 × 90 = 1080 calories. Maria has eaten 3 bars, which is 3 × 90 = 270 calories. Subtracting the calories she has eaten from the total gives 1080 - 270 = 810 calories remaining.  

Start and end your response with the same word (do not write anything after the last word, not even punctuation).
